author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Belt-and-suspenders for Bug 2: prompt instruction, chmod 0444, container :ro overlay, plus post-run sha256 check. Prompt is bypassable, chmod is reversible by the agent, ro mount is container-only — combining all four guarantees at least a loud signal in 'kickoff report'/'status' when drift happens. Tests: 5 new unit tests cover NotProtected/Match/Mismatch/Missing-deleted/Missing-malformed paths; existing exclude-pattern tests updated for the new .kickoff-doc.json entry. Full suite: 2808 passed.
